brief_justification: Correct answer with valid causal reasoning; Multi-level analysis tracing both causal paths and using do-calculus framing; Some self-monitoring via the injected suppression signals but no explicit bias-checking mid-reasoning; Basic verification through the table comparison and do-calculus confirmation but no counterfactual or boundary checks; Acknowledges assumptions (positive, non-redundant effects) but doesn't deeply explore uncertainty; Notes this is not a backdoor issue, implicitly rejecting an alternative framing; Complete derivation trail from DAG to path enumeration to intervention effect to conclusion
